a: TechShastra is the Techno Cultural Fest of Netaji Subhas University — a platform for students to showcase skills, creativity, and innovation across multiple domains of technology through competitions and events.
Any student currently enrolled in a recognised college or university can participate. Students from all years and branches are welcome.
Not at all! TechShastra is open to participants at all skill levels — from complete beginners to experts. Every event has beginner-friendly categories.

q: What should I bring to the event?
a: A valid government id, your school/college id, and your event required belongings
Judging criteria differ by event but generally include innovation, technical complexity, presentation quality, and real-world impact. Detailed rubrics are shared with registered participants.
Winners receive cash prizes & many more with serious bragging rights! Every participant receives a participation certificate.
